Description: Shell fuel stop and truck service facility at I-40 Exit 126 offering truck tire service, DOT inspections, welding, mechanic/oil-lube work, towing, CB shop, deli, and truck parking.

24/7 Speedco truck lube and tire shop at Love's #791, I-40 Exit 126: commercial truck oil change/PM services, light mechanical, national tire brands and Love's retreads, and emergency roadside assistance dispatch (fixed facility).
Love's Truck Care at Love's #244, I-40 Exit 87: commercial truck tire sales and repair, light mechanical service, oil changes, and roadside assistance dispatch (fixed facility at the travel stop).

Description: Certified CAT scale located at Love's Travel Stop #791, I-40 Exit 126 (US-641), Holladay TN; open 24 hours with the travel stop.

Business Name: Benton County I-40 Eastbound Rest Area (Loretta Lynn / Hank Williams Rest Area)
Description: TDOT rest area on I-40 eastbound at MM 130.5 (Benton County, between exits 126 and 133) with truck and car parking, restrooms, water, and picnic tables. This facility replaced the older Parkers Crossroads-area rest stop referenced in older guides. HELD: rule requires direct confirmation from an official TN source; tn.gov and smartway.tn.gov returned HTTP 403 to research access, so official content could not be verified.

Business Name: Benton County I-40 Westbound Rest Area
Description: TDOT rest area on I-40 westbound at MM 131.5 (Benton County, between exits 126 and 133) with truck parking and restrooms. HELD: official TN source (tn.gov/smartway.tn.gov) returned HTTP 403 to research access and no full civic address confirmed, so it cannot be published under the official-source rule.

40-room motel at I-40 Exit 108 near Parkers Crossroads. Marketing copy cites 'all-size vehicle parking' and guest reviews describe room for big rigs, but no explicit official truck-parking confirmation from the property was found. HELD pending direct confirmation.
Speedway fuel station near I-40 Exit 87 with a 24/7 store and 4 truck diesel lanes. HELD: only one source (Allstays) found; truck parking and current brand status unconfirmed.

Business Name: THP Check Station - Poplar Springs (Lexington area, portable scales)
Description: A portable-scale check station near Poplar Springs/Lexington on I-40 is referenced by trucker directories. HELD: official TN source (tn.gov THP scale complex list) returned HTTP 403 to research access and no civic address is available; cannot be published under the official-source rule. Note: no fixed THP scale complex exists between exits 87 and 133 (nearest fixed I-40 scale is Haywood County at MM 50).

24-hour Pilot travel center at I-40 Exit 320 (Genesis Rd) with 8 fuel lanes, 85 public truck parking spaces plus 21 reservable prime spaces, 7 showers, CAT scale, laundry, DEF lanes, and Wendy's and Cinnabon on site.

24-hour Pilot travel center at I-40 Exit 398 (Strawberry Plains Pike) on Knoxville's east side with 9 fuel lanes, 107 public truck parking spaces plus 33 reservable prime spaces, 9 showers, CAT scale, EV chargers, and 24-hour Subway plus Cinnabon.

24-hour Speedway fuel stop at I-40 Exit 412 with 3 truck diesel lanes, bulk DEF, Speedy Cafe fast food, and convenience store. Fuel stop only - no dedicated overnight truck parking lot.

Independent travel plaza at I-40 Exit 412 on the site of the former TR Auto Truck Plaza, reopened with a Jack in the Box restaurant, convenience store, and RV parking with full hookups; affiliated BIR Fleet Services truck repair operates from the same address.

24-hour ONE9 Travel Center (Pilot Company network, formerly Pilot #226) at I-40 Exit 417 (TN-92) with 7 fuel lanes, about 35 truck parking spaces, 4 showers, CAT scale, laundry, DEF lanes, premium WiFi, and on-site Southern Tire Mart truck tire shop.

24-hour Love's Travel Stop at I-40 Exit 432 (Exit 432B westbound) with 95 truck parking spaces, 8 fuel lanes, 7 showers, CAT scale, bulk DEF, laundry, deli, and on-site Speedco tire and preventive maintenance shop.
24-hour Weigel's travel center at I-40 Exit 435 (US-321/Cosby Hwy) with 8 fuel lanes, 24-hour truck diesel, bulk DEF, about 10 truck parking spots in a lighted paved lot, deli, and convenience store.
24-hour Weigel's fuel stop at I-40 Exit 356 (Gallaher Rd/TN-58) in Kingston with 7 fuel lanes, 24-hour truck diesel, bulk DEF, ATM, and convenience store.
